---
title: "Field Notes (Currently Japanese Only)"
number-sections: false
crossref:
  chapters: false
format:
  html:
    include-in-header:
      - text: |
          <link rel="alternate" hreflang="ja" href="https://deepflows.net/note" />
          <link rel="alternate" hreflang="en" href="https://deepflows.net/note-en" />
listing:
  - id: geo-onsen
    contents:
      - "posts/note/onsen-part1/index.qmd"
      - "posts/note/onsen-part2/index.qmd"
      - "posts/note/sekigahara/index.qmd"
      - "posts/note/intro/index.qmd"
    type: grid
    fields: [date, title, image]
    sort: "date desc"
    categories: false
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
  - id: lab-notes
    contents:
      - "posts/note/vibe-coding-do-you-love-me/index.qmd"
      - "posts/note/reactive-transport-part1/index.qmd"
      - "posts/note/pde-part1/index.qmd"
    type: grid
    fields: [date, title, image]
    sort: "date desc"
    categories: false
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
  - id: groundwater
    contents:
      - "posts/note/groundwater-beppu/index.qmd"
      - "posts/note/groundwater-contour/index.qmd"
    type: grid
    fields: [date, title, image]
    sort: "date desc"
    categories: false
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
---

```{=html}
<style>
/* Series Section Headers */
.series-section-header {
  text-align: center;
  margin: 4rem 0 2rem;
  padding-bottom: 1.5rem;
  border-bottom: 2px dashed #E8E4DC;
}
.series-heading {
  font-size: 2.2rem;
  font-weight: 800;
  color: #1A1A1A;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  gap: 16px;
  letter-spacing: 0.02em;
  margin-bottom: 0.8rem;
}
.series-icon {
  font-size: 2.5rem;
}
.series-subheading {
  font-size: 1.05rem;
  color: #6B7280;
  font-weight: 500;
  margin: 0;
}
</style>
```

**"Records of the dramas of nature and trial-and-error behind the data and code."**

This page is a collection of essays and research notes from various perspectives that do not fit into the framework of full-fledged technical tutorials ([Series](/blog-en.qmd)).

From columns scientifically deciphering the chemical properties of hot springs, to considerations of the impact of topography and geography on history, to records of failures encountered in daily simulations, and down-to-earth troubleshooting. It unpretentiously records the "thought process" and "curiosity about nature" of a researcher.

:::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12}
```{=html}
<div class="series-section-header">
  <div class="series-heading">
    <span class="series-icon">🌋</span>
    <span>Geo & Onsen</span>
  </div>
  <p class="series-subheading">Science of Hot Springs and Geography <span class="badge-ja">Japanese Only</span></p>
</div>
```

:::{#geo-onsen}
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12}
```{=html}
<div class="series-section-header">
  <div class="series-heading">
    <span class="series-icon">🔬</span>
    <span>AI & Python</span>
  </div>
  <p class="series-subheading">AI Collaboration and Python Simulation Optimization <span class="badge-ja">Japanese Only</span></p>
</div>
```

:::{#lab-notes}
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12}
```{=html}
<div class="series-section-header">
  <div class="series-heading">
    <span class="series-icon">🌊</span>
    <span>Groundwater & Hydrology</span>
  </div>
  <p class="series-subheading">Fundamental methods and explanations <span class="badge-ja">Japanese Only</span></p>
</div>
```

:::{#groundwater}
:::
:::

::::

```{=html}
<style>
/* 言語バッジ */
.badge-ja {
  font-size: 0.75em;
  background-color: #FFF7ED;
  color: #D97706;
  padding: 2px 6px;
  border-radius: 4px;
  font-weight: bold;
  border: 1px solid #FDBA74;
  margin-left: 6px;
  vertical-align: middle;
}

/* Card Design and Hover effects */
.quarto-grid-item.card {
  transition: all 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.25, 0.8, 0.25, 1);
  box-shadow: 0 4px 6px rgba(217, 119, 6, 0.05);
  border: 1px solid rgba(217, 119, 6, 0.4) !important;
  background-color: #FFFAF0 !important;
}
.quarto-grid-item.card:hover {
  transform: translateY(-8px);
  box-shadow: 0 12px 20px rgba(217, 119, 6, 0.2);
  border-color: rgba(217, 119, 6, 0.8) !important;
}
</style>
```
